summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Financial Statements module (Laporan Keuangan). Backend API testing: 100% pass rate (13/13 tests). All endpoints working correctly including Income Statement, Balance Sheet (single & comparative), CSV exports, entity scoping, and GL regression. Frontend verified by main agent via screenshots showing correct rendering of Laba-Rugi & Neraca comparative views.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/finance/income-statement (no filters) - returns correct structure with sections (revenue/cogs/opex), revenue_total, gross_profit, net_income, margins
Backend: GET /api/finance/income-statement (with start & end filters) - period filtering works correctly
Backend: GET /api/finance/balance-sheet (single period, as_of) - returns assets/liabilities/equity structure, balanced=true

Backend: GET /api/finance/balance-sheet (comparative mode with compare_as_of) - returns comparative=true, compare block with assets/liabilities/equity totals, delta block, equity.compare_current_earnings, line-level compare_amount & delta
Backend: GET /api/finance/income-statement/export.csv - valid CSV with correct headers (Content-Type: text/csv, Content-Disposition: attachment; filename=laba-rugi.csv)
Backend: GET /api/finance/balance-sheet/export.csv (single period) - valid CSV without comparative columns
Backend: GET /api/finance/balance-sheet/export.csv (comparative) - valid CSV with Pembanding & Delta columns
Backend: Entity scoping via entity_id query parameter works correctly
Backend: Entity scoping via X-Entity-Id header works correctly
Backend: GL regression - /api/gl/trial-balance returns balanced books (Debit=10000000.0, Credit=10000000.0, Balanced=True)
Backend: GL regression - /api/gl/summary returns journal_count=3, balanced=True
Backend: GL regression - /api/gl/journal returns 3 journal entries
Frontend: Main agent verified via screenshots - Laba-Rugi & Neraca comparative views display correctly with proper structure and data

success_percentage.frontend: Verified by main agent via screenshots - all views rendering correctly
